# Chapter 8: Beams, columns, frames  (~120 pp)
- 8.1 Bending: Euler-Bernoulli theory (15) · 8.2 Beam deflection (15) · 8.3 Combined loading (12) · 8.4 Buckling: Euler's formula and beyond (15) · 8.5 Frames: indeterminate structures (15) · 8.6 Energy methods for structures (15) · 8.7 Code-based design preview (12) · 8.8 Failure section: column buckling, beam fatigue, joint detail failures (21)

**Archetype**: stability, scaling. **Project**: design a small bookshelf; perform stress analysis; build it; verify. **Exercises**: 40.
